creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 204267
knot-resolver 4.0.0 - with lmdb failing

I'm trying to make the upgrade, but failing at lmdb, which -according the docs- is no longer needed.
Further meson/ninja became the method to build.
So right now my work is ugly - for example all options are (tmp) on, and should be returned to normal (cause all deps and deps of deps are bloating the install).

My question is:
can somebody please tell me what is the correct lmdb flag to put?
I'm puzzled / still can't find out where/how.
